title: Stage 08 — Timed ad script (typed beats)
description: Typed I/O contract for /mkt-creative-run Stage 08 (design §2/§6.1 — no free-text handoffs). Stage 08 turns the Stage-07 brief + persona + force-map into a timed, beat-by-beat script. This schema formalizes the hand-built CHECKPOINT-1 sample (context/proposed/creative-runs/20260608-072919/sample-stage-08-script.md) into typed fields: each beat names its shot, on-screen text, VO, motion, the JTBD force it serves (force_ref), the motivator(s) it pulls (motivator_refs), and every claim it asserts (claim_refs). The on_screen_text is the surface the deterministic claims floor runs publish-mode against. provenance: run_id + persona_ref; spec pins aspect_ratio / duration_s / muted_first.

claimRef.description: A reference to one approved/declared claim id in context/claims.json (e.g. "CLM-008"). The bare id only — render markers ([[...]]/{{...}}) are presentation. The deterministic claims floor reads these to fail-close on unverified claims.

claimRefs.description: Every claim id this beat's copy asserts (empty when the beat makes no PrepEdu claim — e.g. an end-card or agitate beat). Typed surface for the claims gate — never inferred from prose.

forceRef.description: The single JTBD force this beat primarily serves (push / pull / anxiety / habit), per context/proposed/motivator-map.md Stage-04 force-map.

motivatorRef.description: A motivator id from context/proposed/motivator-map.md (segment letter + number, e.g. "A1", "A2", "B6", "C3").

run_id.description: Timestamped run id (e.g. 20260608-072919) — ties this artifact to the run manifest.

persona_ref.description: Persona this script targets, referencing context/proposed/audience-personas.md (e.g. "Persona 4 — Thảo (Segment A)").

spec.description: Production spec pinned for the whole script.

duration_s.description: Total runtime in seconds (e.g. 15). Beats should sum to ≤ this.

muted_first.description: Whether the script is muted-first — every spoken line is also burned-in on-screen text so the message lands with sound off.

beats.description: The ordered beats of the script. Each beat is the typed form of one '**Beat N — …**' block in the hand-built sample.

timecode.description: The beat's time window as authored (e.g. "0.0-2.0s" / "9.0–11.5s"). A label, not parsed — accepts the sample's en-dash or hyphen form.

shot.description: The visual shot description for this beat.

on_screen_text.description: Burned-in on-screen text (locale-native, muted-first). This is the surface the deterministic claims floor runs publish-mode against. Use an empty string for a beat with no on-screen text.

vo.description: Voice-over line (locale-native). Empty string when the beat has no VO (e.g. an end-card that holds, muted-safe).

motion.description: Sound / motion / transition direction for the beat.

motivator_refs.description: The motivator id(s) this beat pulls (e.g. ["A1", "A2"]). Empty allowed for a pure brand/end-card beat that serves no specific motivator.
